BackstoryDef.title: Child soldier
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Following the collapse of civil society, [PAWN_nameDef] was forcefully enlisted by [PAWN_pronoun]'s' government as a civil fighter. [PAWN_nameDef] was forced to engage in guerrilla warfare with multiple anarchy groups, commonly using [PAWN_possessive] age as a coverup to get the upper hand on the enemy.
